metadata.description: CaseMgr plugins for Claude Code — turn CaseMgr into a shared workspace your AI agent can read and write to.

plugins.name: casemgr-channel
plugins.description: Pushes AI work items from CaseMgr — a shared workspace for you and your AI agent — into your running Claude Code session as channel events. When a CMMN workflow in CaseMgr produces a pending work item, the plugin forwards it via SSE so Claude can claim, execute, and complete it without any human prompt. Uses Bearer-token auth, real-time event delivery with polling fallback, and a /casemgr-channel:configure skill for setup.
